name: Royalty RP
description: A royal/royalty RP. Be a princess, prince, knight/guard, normal peasant, queen, king, duke, duchess, lord, lady, count, countess, baron, baroness, royal cousin, betrothed/royal fiancé, royal advisor, chancellor, steward, chamberlain, royal tutor/governess, court lady/lady-in-waiting, court jester, royal scribe, messenger/herald, captain of the guards, scout/ranger, weapons master, castle watch, oracle/seer, court mage/royal alchemist, merchant/trader, blacksmith, innkeeper/tavern owner, farmer, baker, miller, healer/herbalist, apprentice, spy/informant, assassin, rebel leader, outlaw/bandit, usurper, foreign prince, foreign princess, ambassador/envoy, visiting noble, or any in-between (if there are any).
creator: RoseMose999
